zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith於1308年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire阿爾可時，她的父親Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale31歲，母親Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire37歲。她於1337年與Sir John Douglas of Lothian在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1377年8月1日在英國蘇格蘭金洛-爾金洛斯享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith于1308年出生在苏格兰Linlithgowshire阿爾可时，她的父亲Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale31岁，母亲Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire37岁。她于1337年与Sir John Douglas of Lothian在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1377年8月1日在英国苏格兰金洛-爾金洛斯享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith was born in 1308, in Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, was 31 and her mother, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, was 37. She married Sir John Douglas of Lothian in 1337, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 August 1377, in Kinross, Kinross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith est née en 1308, à Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Douglas of Lothian en 1337, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1377, à Kinross, Kinross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith 1308 in Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale 31 und ihre Mutter Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire 37. Sie hat 1337 in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Douglas of Lothian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. August 1377 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Kinross, Kinross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith è nata il nel 1308 nel Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Douglas of Lothian nel 1337, nel Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 agosto 1377, nel Kinross, Kinross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeithが1308年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireアバーコルンで生まれた時，父Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdaleは31歳，母Isabella Erskine- of Perthshireは37歳であった。1337年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスでSir John Douglas of Lothianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1377年8月1日にイギリススコットランドキンロス-シュアイアキンロスで69歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith(이)가 1308년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 압르코른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1337년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 Sir John Douglas of Lothian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 8월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨로스-실르 킨로스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith nasceu em 1308, em Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Douglas of Lothian em 1337, em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1377, em Kinross, Kinross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith родилась в 1308 г. в местности абиркорн, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Douglas of Lothian в 1337 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 августа 1377 г. в местности кинросс, кинросс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith nació en 1308, en Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir John Douglas of Lothian en 1337, en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1377, en Kinross, Kinross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Midlothian, Scotland.
